suite.name: Api Bearer Suite

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://postman-echo.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: TC-01 Autenticar con Bearer token y validar que el servidor lo recibió

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/headers path_url=/headers headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer token-demo-12345'} body=None

/home/csotelo/.pyenv/versions/3.12.0/envs/robfram/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'postman-echo.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: postman-echo.com/headers refleja en la respuesta todos los headers recibidos — incluido Authorization — ideal para validar el patrón Bearer sin depender de un servicio de autenticación real.

test.name: TC-02 Enviar payload JSON con POST y validar estructura de respuesta

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/post path_url=/post headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'sails.sid=s%3AhT5onSdCQGjtR4VlvLhf9GhDqQKLCeVJ.EGwZKeW%2FwfUV%2BlXMnlhuK8ArTCopZde68dHu3oypExw; __cf_bm=5nBIylxlYSxddj.GyP21ea3Km9xEh2WS4ZUjb6ljyv0-1781605943.6130884-1.0.1.1-gVqNNyBWpqL1VD1dCuyVRQv_GfVAreXiyPxxXsPm8FryHcg9pED5Bx7D1ut7Gd2i_a67ehcl.CabwQPfJcz.gqijk.rMadaxAzrd31XPPtCtIwb6tbvQ2Pmysie7b_u3; _cfuvid=La_crv56d7Dy5sXlppCBmDjovXQ7JgoaYxlpw7gWWkQ-1781605943.6130884-1.0.1.1-X8wjPKN6Q69PjR3AXkxFdkzomF5.6la13sZrJBllMto', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"cliente": "Ana P\\u00e9rez", "plan": "Premium"}'

/home/csotelo/.pyenv/versions/3.12.0/envs/robfram/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'postman-echo.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: postman-echo.com/post devuelve, dentro de la clave "json", exactamente el payload enviado — útil para validar que el cuerpo se serializó correctamente.

test.name: TC-03 Validar contrato de un endpoint conocido (campos obligatorios)

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/get?plan=premium path_url=/get?plan=premium headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Cookie': 'sails.sid=s%3A1XQiV9yaoU6yyfIsE06mwdwxsBNsJE3j.J5DnjpN492Rk1Q5qbiO%2FVKDiYsqsE8LAkQI9xL4wIDM; __cf_bm=5nBIylxlYSxddj.GyP21ea3Km9xEh2WS4ZUjb6ljyv0-1781605943.6130884-1.0.1.1-gVqNNyBWpqL1VD1dCuyVRQv_GfVAreXiyPxxXsPm8FryHcg9pED5Bx7D1ut7Gd2i_a67ehcl.CabwQPfJcz.gqijk.rMadaxAzrd31XPPtCtIwb6tbvQ2Pmysie7b_u3; _cfuvid=La_crv56d7Dy5sXlppCBmDjovXQ7JgoaYxlpw7gWWkQ-1781605943.6130884-1.0.1.1-X8wjPKN6Q69PjR3AXkxFdkzomF5.6la13sZrJBllMto'} body=None

/home/csotelo/.pyenv/versions/3.12.0/envs/robfram/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1110: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'postman-echo.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Numbers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to real numbers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Validación de contrato básica: confirmar que los campos esperados existen en la respuesta.

suite.doc: Práctica 13 — Sesión 7. Suite de pruebas API con autenticación Bearer y validación de estructura/valores de respuesta JSON.
